about_page.title: About Us
about_page.tagline: The architect of your digital performance.
about_page.mission_text: DigitOwls was born from a simple conviction: technological innovation only matters when it serves operational reality. We support banks, insurance companies and innovative businesses in transforming their technological challenges into growth drivers. More than a consulting firm, we are your accelerator. We combine deep knowledge of financial industries, mastery of AI technologies and rapid deployment capabilities to create concrete, secure and profitable solutions.
about_page.partnership_text: DigitOwls is the exclusive representative of Proxym in Canada. This strategic alliance allows us to offer the Canadian market the best of both worlds:
about_page.partnership_local: Local agility — A Montreal-based team close to you, responsive and aware of North American challenges.
about_page.partnership_global: Global power — Immediate access to the resources of a European digital transformation leader (350+ experts, 20 years of experience).
about_page.pillar_1_text: Turn uncertainty into results. Our innovation lab helps organizations move from theory to practice.
about_page.pillar_2_text: We speak your language. Leveraging our teams' experience and Proxym group's strategic tools, we modernize the core of your operations.
about_page.pillar_3_text: The right skill, at the right time. Talent shortages should not slow your growth.

blog_page.title: Our Blog
blog_page.description: Articles, insights and perspectives on artificial intelligence.

careers_page.no_jobs: No positions available at the moment.
careers_page.spontaneous_text: No position matches your profile? Send us your resume at

qa-automation.title: QA Automation Specialist
qa-automation.description: We are looking for a senior QA Automation specialist to put automated testing, quality and reliability at the heart of our products.
responsibilities: Design and implement automated testing strategies
Develop and maintain testing frameworks (UI, API, performance)
Collaborate with development teams to integrate quality into the CI/CD cycle
Analyze test results and produce quality reports
Participate in code reviews and promote testing best practices
requirements: Proficiency in Selenium, Cypress, Playwright or similar tools
Experience with CI/CD pipelines (Jenkins, GitLab CI, GitHub Actions)
Excellent analytical skills and attention to detail

ai-blockchain-architect.title: AI & Blockchain Architect
ai-blockchain-architect.description: We are looking for a senior architect capable of carrying a strategic vision, designing robust architectures and delivering concrete AI and blockchain use cases.
responsibilities: Define the technical architecture of AI and blockchain solutions
Evaluate and recommend appropriate technologies and platforms
Design proofs of concept (POC) and functional prototypes
Support clients in their technology innovation strategy
Ensure solution scalability, security and performance
requirements: Knowledge of blockchain technologies (Ethereum, Solidity, Web3)
Technical leadership and ability to simplify complex concepts

lead-fullstack.title: Lead Fullstack Developer
lead-fullstack.description: We are looking for a senior lead fullstack developer combining technical skills, leadership, delivery and scalability.
responsibilities: Technically lead a team of developers
Design and develop high-performance web and mobile applications
Define code standards and development best practices
Participate in solution architecture and technology choices
Ensure continuous delivery and code quality
requirements: Experience with SQL and NoSQL databases
Knowledge of DevOps and CI/CD practices

products_page.title: Our Products
products_page.description: Concrete AI tools to accelerate your transformation.

cadrage_page.title: Our AI Scoping Tool
cadrage_page.subtitle: Your AI Project starts here!
cadrage_page.description: With our free AI agent, go from intuition to experimentation in less than 10 minutes!
cadrage_page.card_1_title: Transform your AI idea into a clear first concept!
cadrage_page.card_1_text: You want to integrate AI into your organization, you have needs or use case ideas — our AI scoping agent can help you.
cadrage_page.card_2_title: Why start an AI project now?
cadrage_page.card_2_text: AI is already creating value across all sectors. The goal: help you identify the simplest, most useful, and quickly testable opportunity.
cadrage_page.card_3_step_1: You discuss your idea and/or your needs with our AI agent
cadrage_page.card_3_step_2: Our AI agent helps you define and organize your idea
cadrage_page.card_3_step_3: You receive your project summary by email

octave-koudoyor.name: Octave Koudoyor
octave-koudoyor.bio: Founder and president of DigitOwls, Octave drives the firm's strategic vision and supports businesses in their digital transformation through artificial intelligence.

xavier-bouclet.name: Xavier Bouclet
xavier-bouclet.bio: Xavier Bouclet is an expert in software development and backend architecture, with over 15 years of experience designing and industrializing complex digital solutions. Speaker at ConFoo and co-organizer of the Montréal JUG community, he shares his expertise in development industrialization, API optimization and DevOps best practices.

alban-pellegrini.name: Alban Pellegrini
alban-pellegrini.bio: Alban Pellegrini is co-founder and Lead Mobile Developer at DigitOwls, bringing deep expertise in developing innovative, user-oriented mobile applications. He combines startup thinking, agility and technical excellence to turn ambitious ideas into reliable, scalable mobile products.

gregoire-guenot.name: Grégoire Guenot
gregoire-guenot.bio: Grégoire Guenot is a digital leader and entrepreneur recognized for his ability to transform technological ambitions into concrete results. Co-founder of several innovative projects, he combines strategic vision, operational rigor and startup agility to accelerate value creation.

alexander-kirilov.name: Alexander Kirilov
alexander-kirilov.bio: Alexander Kirilov is an AI architect and digital innovation expert, specialized in designing and industrializing high-strategic-value artificial intelligence solutions. His ability to translate complex business needs into robust, scalable AI architectures makes him a key driver of innovation.

audrey-van-hoorebeke.name: Audrey Van Hoorebeke
audrey-van-hoorebeke.bio: Audrey Van Hoorebeke is a leader in digital transformation and strategic program management, recognized for her ability to orchestrate complex, high-impact business initiatives while guiding teams in adopting and sustaining digital solutions.

herlin-tang.name: Herlin Tang
herlin-tang.bio: Digital technology expert at DigitOwls, Herlin contributes to designing and deploying innovative solutions for our clients.

luigi-tomegah.name: Luigi Tomegah
luigi-tomegah.bio: Digital technology expert at DigitOwls, Luigi brings his technical expertise to accelerate our clients' transformation projects.

olivier-trudeau.name: Olivier Trudeau
olivier-trudeau.bio: Artificial intelligence expert at DigitOwls, Olivier contributes to the research and development of advanced AI solutions.

conseil-strategie.title: AI Consulting & Strategy
conseil-strategie.short: Turn your vision into an operational roadmap.
conseil-strategie.tagline: Don't get swept away by the AI wave. Ride it with a clear, ethical and profitable strategy.
conseil-strategie.description: Artificial intelligence offers immense opportunities, but where do you start? Without a precise plan, companies risk scattering their resources on gadgets with no ROI or hitting regulatory walls.
conseil-strategie.approach_text: We act as your digital architects. Our intervention unfolds in three stages:
benefits: Opportunity Identification: Analysis of your processes to detect the highest value-added use cases.
Prioritization & Roadmap: Creating a realistic game plan, aligned with your business objectives and budget constraints.
Governance & Ethics: Setting up frameworks to ensure secure, responsible and regulation-compliant deployment.
results: An optimized budget focused on high-impact projects.
Reduced risks related to data compliance.

fintech-assurances.title: Fintech & Insurance Solutions
fintech-assurances.tagline: Digitowls is the exclusive reseller in Canada. Deploy seamless, secure and 100% digital customer experiences.
fintech-assurances.description: The financial sector must modernize quickly against neo-banks, but developing proprietary solutions takes years.
fintech-assurances.approach_text: As an exclusive partner, we give you access to a suite of globally proven platforms:
benefits: Digital & Mobile Banking: Modern UX/UI to retain your customers.
Insurance Solutions (Insurtech): AI-automated claims management and underwriting.
Agility & Cloud: Modular solutions that integrate with your existing Core Banking.
results: Accelerated Time-to-Market: Launch new products in months, not years.
Bank-grade security: Solutions compliant with the strictest standards.
Customer Experience (CX): Deliver the seamless journey your customers expect.

prototypage.title: Accelerated Prototyping (POC)
prototypage.short: From idea to functional prototype in 4 to 6 weeks.
prototypage.tagline: Validate business value before investing heavily. Innovate fast, learn, and visualize your projects to succeed better.
prototypage.description: Traditional IT projects are long and costly ("Tunnel Effect"). Launching a complete solution without testing its market fit is a major financial risk.
prototypage.approach_text: The AI "Fast-Track" — We create a usable Proof of Concept (POC) in record time:
benefits: Express scoping (1 week): Definition of the critical perimeter.
Agile Development (3-4 weeks): Building the MVP (Minimum Viable Product).
Testing & Validation (1 week): User feedback and ROI measurement.
results: Cost reduction: Test for a fraction of the price of a full project.
Proof by example: Demonstrate value to your management or investors with concrete results.
Real data: Make your "Go / No-Go" decision based on field feedback.
prototypage.cta: Book a consultation session to start your prototype

formation.title: AI Training
formation.short: Prepare your teams for the era of Artificial Intelligence.
formation.tagline: Technology is nothing without the talent to drive it. Develop a culture of innovation internally.
formation.description: AI adoption often fails not because of the technology, but because of the human factor. Resistance to change and lack of technical skills are the main barriers to your transformation.
formation.approach_text: We don't just do theory. Our training is practical and tailored to your industry:
benefits: For decision-makers: Understand the strategic challenges of AI to better lead.
For technical teams: Hands-on workshops on new tools (LLM, Automation, Data Science).
For all employees: Acculturation to demystify AI and encourage daily adoption.
results: Autonomous and confident teams facing new tools.
Increased productivity through real AI adoption.
A stronger employer brand, attracting innovative talent.
formation.cta: Book a session to identify your training needs

talents.title: AI Talent Placement
talents.short: Next-generation technical expertise, integrated within your team.
talents.tagline: Access the best "hybrid" consultants, capable of navigating between legacy systems and modern AI.
talents.description: Finding experts is difficult. Finding experts who understand both your old systems (Legacy) and new AI technologies is nearly impossible on the traditional market.
talents.approach_text: We're not traditional headhunters. We're tech experts who recruit tech experts.
benefits: Hybrid Consultants: Trained to bridge the gap between the old and new IT world.
AI & Data Experts: Ready to be deployed on your specific projects.
Rigorous Selection: All our talent is technically tested by our team before being presented to you.
results: Consultants operational from day one ("Plug & Play").
Flexibility to strengthen your teams based on project load.
talents.cta: Contact us for a free consultation

audit.title: Intelligent Technology Audit
audit.tagline: A 360° evaluation of your projects, suppliers and architectures to move forward without blind spots.
audit.description: Technical debt, security vulnerabilities, unreliable suppliers or AI-incompatible architecture... Invisible risks can derail your growth.
benefits: Architecture Audit: Is your infrastructure ready to scale (Scalability)?
Supplier Due Diligence: Technical and financial evaluation of your technology partners.
Security & AI Risk Audit: Analysis of vulnerabilities and robustness of your algorithmic models.
results: A detailed report with prioritized recommendations.
A precise mapping of your technical risks.
A remediation plan to restart on solid foundations.
